## Boxscore fixture

Download a Sidearm boxscore HTML file once and save it here as `sidearm/14570.html`:

```bash
curl -L "https://babsonathletics.com/sports/baseball/stats/2025/suffolk/boxscore/14570" -o tests/fixtures/sidearm/14570.html
```

## Trackman fixture

Save a Trackman Team Portal HAR file here as `trackman/<reportId>.har` so offline recon tests can run.
